tasks.title: Automated Config Validator - Daily Version Check
tasks.description: Daily check of OpenClaw and Ollama GitHub releases for new versions. Parse changelogs for breaking changes, validate current config compatibility, propose updates.
tasks.notes:
**📊 Daily Config Validator Check - 2026-02-20 07:01 AM**

**OpenClaw Status:**
- Current: v2026.2.13 (installed via npm)
- Latest: v2026.2.19 (released 2026-02-19)
- Gap: 6 days behind

**Ollama Status:**
- Latest: v0.16.2 (released 2026-02-14)
- Windows installer: OllamaSetup.exe (1.26GB)

**🔍 Breaking Changes Analysis - OpenClaw v2026.2.19:**

**CONFIG-RELATED (Review Required):**
1. `gateway.auth.token` now auto-generated on startup if not set
2. `hooks.token` + `gateway.auth.token` collision now FAILS startup (security fix)
3. Frontmatter YAML parsing now uses YAML 1.2 schema (affects `on`/`off` values)
4. `memory.backend=qmd` skips embedding-provider warnings (new behavior)

**SECURITY HARDENING:**
- SSRF: IPv4 literals now strict dotted-decimal only
- Network: `ws://` plaintext blocked for non-loopback hosts
- Gateway: rate-limit on config.write RPCs (3/min)
- Plugins: path containment enforced with realpath checks

**⚠️ POTENTIAL CONFIG IMPACT:**
| Setting | Old Behavior | New Behavior | Action |
|---------|-------------|--------------|--------|
| `gateway.auth.mode=none` | Allowed | Warning/critical audit | Review if intentional |
| `hooks.token` = `gateway.auth.token` | Allowed | Startup FAILS | Must fix if collision |
| Frontmatter `on`/`off` | Boolean | String (YAML 1.2) | Check SKILL.md files |

**📋 Ollama v0.16.2 Changes:**
- New: `OLLAMA_NO_CLOUD=1` env var for sensitive tasks
- Fix: PowerShell rendering (Windows users)
- Fix: Image generation models (0.16.0/0.16.1 regression)

**🎯 Recommendations:**
1. **OpenClaw:** Update from 2026.2.13 → 2026.2.19 (security fixes)
2. **Pre-update check:** Verify `hooks.token` ≠ `gateway.auth.token`
3. **Post-update:** Validate SKILL.md frontmatter booleans
4. **Ollama:** Update if using experimental image generation models

**Update Command:**
```powershell
npm update -g openclaw
```

tasks.title: Auto-Builder - Local Model Benchmarker
tasks.description: Daily automated benchmark of local Ollama models. Check for new small models, run benchmark suite, track performance over time.
tasks.notes:
**📊 Daily Check - 2026-02-20 06:01 AM**

**Ollama Status:** ✅ Running (http://localhost:11434)

**Available Models (13 total):**
- llama3.1:8b (4.9GB) - Core benchmark model
- mistral:7b (4.4GB) - Core benchmark model
- qwen2.5-coder:7b (4.7GB) - Code-focused benchmark
- codellama:7b (3.8GB) - Code benchmark model
- qwen2.5:7b (4.7GB) - General benchmark
- phi4-reasoning (11GB) - NEW: Microsoft reasoning model
- gpt-oss:20b (14GB) - NEW: OpenAI open-source model
- gemma3:27b (17GB) - NEW: Google Gemma 3
- minimax-m2:cloud, deepseek-v3.1:671b-cloud, kimi-k2.5:cloud - Cloud API configs
- nemotron-3-nano (24GB), glm-4.7-flash (19GB) - Large models

**🔍 New Models Detected (vs last check):**
- phi4-reasoning:latest (~11GB) - Reasoning-focused
- gpt-oss:20b (~14GB) - OpenAI's open model
- gemma3:27b (~17GB) - Google's latest

**⚠️ Benchmark Execution:** BLOCKED - Model inference timeout (>60s) in cron context
- qwen2.5-coder:7b test started but didn't complete in 90s
- Local Ollama is functional but requires more time than cron allows

**📋 Auto-Worker Check (2:34 PM, Friday 2/20):** ✅ No automated actions available. Benchmark execution still blocked by timeout. Manual run recommended when time permits.

**📁 Files Available:**
- benchmark.py - Full benchmark suite
- benchmark.ps1 - PowerShell version
- quick-test.py - Quick smoke test

**🎯 Recommendation:** Run full benchmark manually when time permits:
```
cd projects/local-model-benchmarker
python benchmark.py
```

**✅ Update - 2026-02-21 12:04 AM:** Added a cron-friendly smoke benchmark to get daily signal without long inference timeouts.
- New file: `projects/local-model-benchmarker/cron-smoke.py`
- Writes: `projects/local-model-benchmarker/reports/cron_smoke-YYYY-MM-DD.json`
- Run (manual or cron):
```
cd projects/local-model-benchmarker
python cron-smoke.py
```
- Env knobs: `SMOKE_TIMEOUT_S` (default 45), `SMOKE_MAX_MODELS` (default 2)

tasks.title: World Model Builder - Daily Intelligence Cycle
tasks.description: Automated daily world modeling for AI/ML Infrastructure domain. Scrape latest data, update knowledge graph, run predictions, validate against reality, refine model.
tasks.notes:
✅ **DAILY CYCLE COMPLETE - 2026-02-20**

**📊 Execution Summary:**
- Scrape: 3 sources (GitHub, HF Blog, Reddit) - 2 new entities discovered
- Knowledge Graph: 13 entities, 14 relationships (3 new relationships added)
- Predictions: 10 active (7 carry-forward + 3 new today)
- Validation: 7 predictions checked against reality
- Refinement: 1 new category added (hardware_economics), confidence adjustments made

**🔍 Key Findings:**
1. **STRONG VALIDATION:** vLLM Realtime API shipped - validates WebSocket audio streaming prediction (confidence +10% to 0.70)
2. **CONFIRMED CRISIS:** DDR5 RDIMM prices exceed 3090 per GB - memory cost crisis now documented with 442 upvote Reddit post
3. **NEW TREND:** Enterprise evaluation frameworks (IT-Bench, MAST) emerging as response to black-box leaderboard distrust

**📈 Prediction Accuracy Tracking:**
- Day 2 of 30-day horizon
- 2 predictions ON_TRACK, 1 showing EARLY_INDICATORS
- Net confidence trend: +0.19 (positive)
- Highest confidence: Realtime API adoption (0.70)
- Lowest confidence: GPU vRAM cost-competitive (0.48)

**📁 Files Generated:**
- `raw-data/2026-02-20/scrape-2026-02-20.json` - Raw scrape data
- `knowledge-graph/graph-2026-02-20.json` - Updated graph (13 nodes, 14 edges)
- `predictions/forecasts-2026-02-20.json` - 10 predictions (avg confidence 0.61)
- `validation/validation-2026-02-20.json` - Day 2 validation results
- `refinement/refinement-2026-02-20.json` - Model adjustments

**🎯 Next Run:** 2026-02-21 05:00 AM
